title: Senior Backend Developer (.NET)
description: ICTERRA HAKKINDA ICterra, Münih, İstanbul ve Ankara'da ofisleri bulunan küresel bir yazılım mühendisliği şirketidir. 30 yıllık yazılım geliştirme deneyimini teknoloji uzmanlığı ve kanıtlanmış metodolojilerle birleştirerek, küresel olarak birden fazla sektörde müşterilerimize yenilikçi çözümler sunuyoruz. 200'den fazla yazılım uzmanıyla, yazılım geliştirme ve test hizmetleri sağlayarak dünyanın en iyi BT ve savunma şirketleriyle stratejik ortaklıklar kuruyoruz.Finans sektöründe faaliyet gösteren müşterimiz ile birlikte yürütmüş olduğumuz projelerimiz için Senior Backend Developer olarak müşteri lokasyonundan ve uzaktan çalışabilecek enerjik ekip arkadaşları arıyoruz. GENEL NİTELİKLER Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Elektrik-Elektronik Mühendisliği, Matematik Mühendisliği, Bilişim Sistemleri Mühendisliği, Endüstri Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği ve benzeri mühendislik bölümlerinden mezun En az 6 yıl yazılım geliştirme tecrübesine sahip, Finans, Telekom, e-ticaret veya finans sektör tecrübesi olan,AGILE çalışma prensibine uyum sağlayabilecek, Takım üyeleri ve dış paydaşlarla etkili iletişim kurabilecek, Erkek adaylar için tercihen askerlik görevini tamamlamış, Güçlü iletişime sahip, Analitik düşünme yetkinliği olan, Müşteri ve çözüm odaklı, Ekip çalışmasına yatkın ve takım içerisinde uyumlu TEKNİK YETKİNLİKLER Microsoft .NET teknolojilerine hakimOPP, SOLID prensibleri ve AOP, SOA tasarım kalıpları ve modellerinde bilgili ve deneyimliC#, ASP.NET, MVC, .NET Core, Rest Api, Javascript, TypeScript, JQuery, HTML5, CSS3 ve Ajax konularında deneyimli React, Angular, Bootstrap ve Nodejs teknolojilerinde bilgili ve deneyim sahibi Oracle, SQL, PostgreSQL etc. veri tabanı bilgisine sahip Docker teknolojileri konusunda bilgili Finans sektöründe deneyimli Analitik düşünme ve problem çözme becerilerine sahipEkip çalışmasına uygun, iletişim becerileri güçlü

title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: Jr-Mid Backend Engineer
description: Company Description Papcorns is a mobile app studio building design-driven mobile products used by millions of people around the world. Our apps reach more than 10 million users and are frequently featured by Apple and Google . We believe great products are built by curious people who enjoy learning and experimenting. At Papcorns, we focus on developing AI-powered mobile apps in the Utilities, Photo & Video, and Lifestyle categories, mainly for the US market. Our team builds and scales multiple products while constantly exploring new technologies. As our products and user base continue to grow, we are looking for curious and motivated Junior-Mid Backend Engineers who want to grow with us. Role Description This is a full-time hybrid role for a Jr – Mid Backend Engineer at Papcorns. You will work closely with mobile engineers, designers, and product managers to build and maintain the backend systems powering applications used by millions of people. This role is a great opportunity to develop your skills in a real product environment and learn how scalable mobile backends are built and operated. The role is based in Istanbul, Türkiye , with flexibility for some remote work. Qualifications 1–3 years of experience in backend development Proficiency in Node.js Experience designing and building REST APIs Working knowledge of PostgreSQL or a similar relational database Working knowledge of Firestore or similar NoSQL database Familiarity with Google Cloud Platform and Firebase Basic knowledge of Git Ability to write and maintain code with AI with IDEs like (Cursor / Claude Code / Antigravity ) Ability to collaborate with teammates and communicate ideas clearly Good command of written and spoken English Nice to Have Familiarity with Python Knowledge of Docker and CI/CD pipelines Experience with AI / LLM integrations Background in mobile backend or consumer app environments Responsibilities Design and build backend services and APIs that support mobile apps at scale Collaborate with mobile engineers to define data models and API contracts Work on infrastructure and reliability — performance, scalability, monitoring Contribute to integrations with third-party services (AI, analytics, payments) Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and technical decisions Debug, optimize, and improve existing systems Continuously learn and improve your technical skills What’s in it for you? Competitive Salary Optional Work From Home Opportunity 3 days a week Meal & Commute Compensation Private Health Insurance Birthday Leave Access to Online Courses Tech Gear What it’s like to work at Papcorns? Be part of a passionate and fast-moving team where everyone’s ideas are valued Work on products used by millions of people around the world Access to learning and development opportunities What does the recruitment process look like? Application Review We review your CV to understand your experience and interests. Interview A 30-minute Google Meet interview with our co-founders to get to know each other and talk about your expectations. Technical Meeting A Google Meet session with our tech lead to discuss your experience with backend systems and talk about technical topics. Case Study You will complete a small backend assignment to demonstrate your approach to problem solving. Final Decision Within a few days, we will inform you of our decision regarding your suitability for the role.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: StartupHeroes is looking for a Full Stack Engineer to build end-to-end product features, design and implement API methods, develop modern UI components, and improve the performance and reliability of our systems as we rapidly support our products and organisations. We build apps using reliable tools that our team knows and trusts: Java (Spring Boot), React, TypeScript, Kubernetes, AWS, and MySQL . Expertise in these areas is a huge plus, but familiarity with other common languages and frameworks (Node.js, Go, Python, Angular, etc.) is also valuable. We’re a collaborative team that works closely with product managers, designers, backend, frontend, iOS, Android, automation, and quality engineers. We are looking for engineers that understand that simplicity and reliability are aspects of a system to be carefully calculated with every decision made. StartupHeroes has a positive, diverse, and supportive culture—we look for people who are curious, inventive, and work to be a little better every single day. In our work together we aim to be smart, humble, hardworking and, above all, collaborative. If this sounds like a good fit for you, why not say hello? What you will be doing Work closely with Product Managers, Designers, Backend and Frontend Engineers to conceptualize and build new product features. Build modern, scalable UI components using React, TypeScript, and micro-frontend patterns . Develop RESTful backend services using Java / Spring Boot and collaborate on technical design. Contribute heavily to team projects and deliver high-quality results with significant business impact. Take ownership of features or systems and define their long-term technical health. Collaborate with support and operations teams to troubleshoot and resolve production issues. Continuously improve engineering standards, tooling, and development processes. What you should have You have completed a bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering or related field, or equivalent training, fellowship, or work experience. 1–5 years of professional software development experience. Experience with React, TypeScript, and modern frontend development practices. Solid understanding of computer science fundamentals: data structures, algorithms, distributed systems, RESTful services. Experience in Java (preferably Java 11+) and Spring Boot. Good knowledge of relational databases and SQL. Ability to contribute to technical architecture discussions and drive decisions within the team. Ability to write maintainable, testable, and high-quality code. Strong communication skills — able to explain complex concepts clearly to engineers and stakeholders. What is nice to have Experience with global state management tools (Redux/Redux Saga or Context API). Experience with server state libraries such as React Query (preferred). Experience with UI and location libraries such as Ant Design and Google Maps API (preferred). Experience in micro-frontend architecture (Module Federation, Vite, Webpack). Experience with Kubernetes, AWS, Kafka, Maven/Gradle. Experience with observability tools (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog). Experience in large-scale microservice architectures. What We Can Offer You Remote work option Competitive salary and Bonus package Private health insurance Monthly renewed lunch fee Gift card Relocation support Internet fee support Sports&wellness membership support

title: Full Stack Software Developer
description: About ICterra ICterra is a global software engineering company with offices in Munich, İstanbul and Ankara. We combine 30 years of software development experience with technology expertise and proven methodologies to provide innovative solutions to our customers across multiple industries globally. With 200+ software professionals, we have been building strategic partnerships with the world’s top IT and defence companies, providing software development and test services. Job Summary We are looking for skilled Full Stack Software Developers to design, develop, and maintain scalable applications. The ideal candidate will have strong experience in backend development using Python and modern frontend technologies including React, Redux, and JavaScript. You will work closely with cross-functional and multinational teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain tools and applications in a complex DevOps framework Build robust and scalable backend services using Python (e.g., Django, Flask, or FastAPI) Develop responsive and user-friendly frontend interfaces using React, Redux, and JavaScript Integrate APIs and third-party services Optimize applications for maximum speed, scalability, and performance Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing systems Participate in code reviews and contribute to team best practices Required Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience) Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer or similar role Strong proficiency in Python for backend development Solid experience with React , Redux , and modern JavaScript (ES6+) Experience with RESTful API design and integration Experience with relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL, MS-SQL Server) Understanding of version control systems such as Git Preferred Qualifications Understanding of microservices architecture Familiarity with containerization tools like Docker, orchestration with Kubernetes Experience with CI/CD pipelines, undertanding of the flows is a big plus Knowledge of event streaming platform Apache Kafka
